nasb.text: Let us come before His presence with thanksgiving, Let us shout joyfully to Him with psalms.

esv.text: Let us come into his presence with thanksgiving; let us make a joyful noise to him with songs of praise!

cnv.text: 我們要來到他面前稱謝他， 用詩歌向他歡呼。

ccb.text: 让我们怀着感恩的心来到祂面前， 向祂高唱赞美诗。

csbs.text: 让我们以感谢来到他面前， 用颂歌向他欢呼；
